import React, { useMemo } from 'react'; import { useCart } from '../utils/hooks'; interface CartProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; onCheckout: () => void; } const Cart: React.FC = ({ isOpen, onClose, onCheckout }) => { const { items, total, updateQuantity, removeItem, clear } = useCart(); const shipping = useMemo(() => (total >= 100 || total === 0 ? 0 : 7.95), [total]); const grand = useMemo(() => total + shipping, [total, shipping]); return (
onClose()} className={`absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 transition ${isOpen ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`}>
Your Cart
{items.length === 0 && (
Your cart is empty
Add some items to get started.
)} {items.map((it) => (
{it.product.title}
{it.product.category}
${(it.product.price * it.quantity).toFixed(2)}
{it.quantity}
))}
Subtotal ${total.toFixed(2)}
Shipping {shipping === 0 ? 'Free' : `$${shipping.toFixed(2)}`}
Total ${grand.toFixed(2)}
); }; export default Cart;
